content.json:
# AI Foundry — Nightly Safety & Quality Evals
_Central dashboard for all Foundry project safety and quality evaluation results. Use the filters above to scope by time range, project, or target type._

parameters.name: Project
parameters.label: Project
parameters.query: FoundryEvals_CL | summarize by FoundryProjectName_s | sort by FoundryProjectName_s asc

parameters.name: TargetType
parameters.label: Target Type
parameters.query: FoundryEvals_CL | summarize by TargetType_s | sort by TargetType_s asc

parameters.name: Target
parameters.label: Target
parameters.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| summarize by TargetName_s
| sort by TargetName_s asc

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize EvalRuns = dcount(EvalRunId_s), Targets = dcount(strcat(FoundryProjectName_s, '|', TargetName_s)), ChecksRun = count(), ChecksPassed = countif(Passed_b == true), PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1)
| project rows = pack_array(
    pack('Metric', 'Eval Runs', 'Value', toreal(EvalRuns)),
    pack('Metric', 'Targets Evaluated', 'Value', toreal(Targets)),
    pack('Metric', 'Checks Run', 'Value', toreal(ChecksRun)),
    pack('Metric', 'Checks Passed', 'Value', toreal(ChecksPassed)),
    pack('Metric', 'Overall Pass Rate %', 'Value', PassRate))
| mv-expand rows
| project Metric = tostring(rows['Metric']), Value = toreal(rows['Value'])
content.title: Summary

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), EvaluatorName_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Pass Rate Over Time — by Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1), Checks = count() by EvaluatorName_s
| order by PassRate asc
content.title: Pass Rate — by Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1), Checks = count() by FoundryProjectName_s
| order by PassRate asc
content.title: Pass Rate — by Project

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize AvgScore = round(avg(Score_d), 3), PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1) by TargetType_s, EvaluatorName_s
| order by TargetType_s asc, EvaluatorName_s asc
content.title: Agent vs Model — Score by Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize AvgScore = round(avg(Score_d), 3) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), EvaluatorCategory_s
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Average Score Over Time — by Category

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize
    AvgDurationSec = round(avg(DurationMs_d) / 1000, 1),
    MaxDurationSec = round(max(DurationMs_d) / 1000, 1),
    Runs = count()
  by EvaluatorName_s
| order by AvgDurationSec desc
content.title: Evaluator Duration (seconds)

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize AvgScore = round(avg(Score_d), 3) by FoundryProjectName_s, EvaluatorName_s
| evaluate pivot(EvaluatorName_s, max(AvgScore))
| order by FoundryProjectName_s asc
content.title: Score Heatmap — Project × Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| where Passed_b != true
| project TimeGenerated, FoundryProjectName_s, TargetName_s, TargetType_s, EvaluatorName_s, Score_d, Threshold_d, Severity_s, ErrorMessage_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Failed Eval Checks
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No failures in the selected time range.

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Project = FoundryProjectName_s,
    Target = TargetName_s,
    Type = TargetType_s,
    Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s,
    Category = EvaluatorCategory_s,
    Score = Score_d,
    Threshold = Threshold_d,
    Passed = Passed_b,
    Severity = Severity_s,
    ['Duration (ms)'] = DurationMs_d,
    RunId = EvalRunId_s
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: All Eval Results

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize AvgScore = round(avg(Score_d), 3) by TargetName_s, EvaluatorName_s
| evaluate pivot(EvaluatorName_s, max(AvgScore))
| order by TargetName_s asc
content.title: Score Heatmap — Target × Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize Checks=count(), Passed=countif(Passed_b == true), Failed=countif(Passed_b != true), LastRun=max(TimeGenerated), Project=any(FoundryProjectName_s), Type=any(TargetType_s) by TargetName_s, EvalRunId_s
| summarize arg_max(LastRun, *) by TargetName_s
| extend ['Pass Rate %']=round(100.0 * Passed / Checks, 1)
| project LastRun, Project, Target=TargetName_s, Type, Checks, Passed, Failed, ['Pass Rate %']
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc
content.title: Latest Run — Status per Target

content.query:
let current = FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize CurrentPassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1) by TargetName_s;
let prior = FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated between(ago(14d)..ago(7d))
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where 'value::all' in ({TargetType}) or TargetType_s in ({TargetType})
| where 'value::all' in ({Target}) or TargetName_s in ({Target})
| summarize PriorPassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1) by TargetName_s;
current
| join kind=leftouter prior on TargetName_s
| project Target=TargetName_s, ['This Week %']=CurrentPassRate, ['Prior Week %']=PriorPassRate, ['Change %']=round(CurrentPassRate - PriorPassRate, 1)
| order by ['Change %'] asc
content.title: Week-over-Week Regression
